completed_work: Extended build_latest_context_manifest with include_l0 and l0_store parameters.
Added compact L0 JSON rendering for l0_summary context items.
key_decisions: Use existing ContextPackItem item_type l0_summary; do not add a new L0 item type or new dataclass.
Keep explicit L0 inclusion guarded and non-fatal: invalid requested records become exclusions, not crashes.
next_actions: Decide whether to wire explicit L0 inclusion into provider prompt paths or add diagnostics/listing support around explicit L0 context-pack exclusions.
risks: The include_l0 path is explicit only; automatic retrieval, dependency traversal, ranking, and admission-aware L0 expansion remain deferred.
summary_text: Added guarded explicit L0 context-pack inclusion. The implementation uses the existing l0_summary context item type rather than inventing a new type. Explicit L0 IDs are loaded from the configured L0 store, validated with validate_l0_summary_record, checked for chunk_id/file-name consistency, and converted into ContextPackItem entries. Missing, unreadable, malformed, non-object, invalid, or mismatched L0 records are skipped with non-fatal policy exclusions. build_context_pack.py now accepts --include-l0 and --l0-store. The markdown renderer uses a compact validated L0 rendering path for l0_summary items instead of raw JSON source dumping. Focused and full tests passed before commit.
